subject: [AAI] Testing a revert of v26 to v24
commit_message:
[AAI] Testing a revert of v26 to v24

Issues happening for SO so trying to revert
just the mS to see if that is the issue
for gating

Issue-ID: AAI-3435
Change-Id: Ib3600518cb85b8ce01226abd9b339cab6b72b0b7
Signed-off-by: wr148d <wr148d@att.com>
